tool.name: airtable_bulk_create_records
tool.description: Create multiple records across Airtable tables in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Pass comma-separated table URLs and a JSON array of field value objects. Each URL gets one record created.

parameters.name: field_values
parameters.description: JSON array of field:value objects, one per URL (e.g. '[{"Name":"Record A"},{"Name":"Record B"}]'). If a single object is provided, it is used for all URLs.
